children.heading: Eligible applicants
children.label: a Eligible applicants
children.text: A State educational agency may apply for a grant under this part for a grant period of not less than 1 year and not more than 5 years.

children.label: A
children.text: not less than 1 institution of higher education; and

children.label: B
children.text: the State agencies responsible for administering subchapter III, early education, child care, and vocational rehabilitation programs.

children.label: B
children.text: parents of children with disabilities ages birth through 26;

children.label: C
children.text: parents of nondisabled children ages birth through 26;

children.label: E
children.text: parent training and information centers or community parent resource centers funded under sections 1471 and 1472 of this title, respectively;

children.label: F
children.text: community based and other nonprofit organizations involved in the education and employment of individuals with disabilities;

children.label: G
children.text: personnel as defined in ;section 1451(b) of this title

children.label: H
children.text: the State advisory panel established under subchapter II;

children.label: I
children.text: the State interagency coordinating council established under subchapter III;

children.label: K
children.text: the State agency for higher education;

children.label: L
children.text: public agencies with jurisdiction in the areas of health, mental health, social services, and juvenile justice;

children.label: M
children.text: other providers of professional development that work with infants, toddlers, preschoolers, and children with disabilities; and

children.label: A
children.text: include that individual, entity, or agency as a partner in the partnership under this subsection; and

children.label: B
children.text: ensure that any activities the State educational agency will carry out under this part that are within that partner’s jurisdiction (which may include activities described in ) are carried out by that partner.section 1454(b) of this title
